# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  projectName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: devenv
    metadata:
      description: Project name used as prefix for all resources

  vmCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 10
    metadata:
      description: Number of developer VMs to create

  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Administrator username for the VMs

  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for the VMs

  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_DS2_v2
    allowedValues:
      - Standard_DS1_v2
      - Standard_DS2_v2
      - Standard_DS3_v2
      - Standard_D2s_v3
      - Standard_D4s_v3
      - Standard_B2s
      - Standard_B2ms
    metadata:
      description: Size of the developer VMs

  osType:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Windows
    allowedValues:
      - Windows
      - Linux
    metadata:
      description: Operating system type for the VMs

  windowsOSVersion:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 2022-datacenter-g2
    allowedValues:
      - 2019-datacenter-gensecond
      - 2022-datacenter-g2
      - 2022-datacenter-azure-edition
    metadata:
      description: Windows Server version (used when osType is Windows)

  ubuntuOSVersion:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 22_04-lts-gen2
    allowedValues:
      - 20_04-lts-gen2
      - 22_04-lts-gen2
    metadata:
      description: Ubuntu version (used when osType is Linux)

  allowedSourceIPPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "*"
    metadata:
      description: >-
        Source IP address prefix allowed for RDP/SSH access.
        Use your office/home IP CIDR for better security (e.g., 203.0.113.0/24).
        Default '*' allows all sources - NOT recommended for production.

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

variables:
  vnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vnet')]"
  vnetAddressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/16
  subnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-subnet')]"
  subnetAddressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
  nsgName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-nsg')]"
  rdpPort: 3389
  sshPort: 22
  windowsImageReference:
    publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
    offer: WindowsServer
    sku: "[parameters('windowsOSVersion')]"
    version: latest
  linuxImageReference:
    publisher: Canonical
    offer: 0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy
    sku: "[parameters('ubuntuOSVersion')]"
    version: latest
  imageReference: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), variables('windowsImageReference'), variables('linuxImageReference'))]"
  remoteAccessPort: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), variables('rdpPort'), variables('sshPort'))]"
  remoteAccessProtocol: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), 'RDP', 'SSH')]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "[concat('Allow-', variables('remoteAccessProtocol'), '-Inbound')]"
          properties:
            priority: 1000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "[variables('remoteAccessPort')]"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "[concat('Allow ', variables('remoteAccessProtocol'), ' access from specified source IP range')]"

        - name: Allow-HTTPS-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 1010
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: Allow HTTPS inbound for dev/test web applications

        - name: Allow-HTTP-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 1020
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: Allow HTTP inbound for dev/test web applications

        - name: Allow-Custom-Dev-Ports
          properties:
            priority: 1030
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: 8080-8090
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: Allow common development server ports (8080-8090)

        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic not explicitly allowed

  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[variables('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[variables('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard
      tier: Regional
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
      publicIPAddressVersion: IPv4
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
      idleTimeoutInMinutes: 15
    copy:
      name: publicIPCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-nic')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))]"
      networkSecurityGroup:
        id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    copy:
      name: nicCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-nic'))]"
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), 'vm', copyIndex(1))]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        linuxConfiguration: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), json('{\"disablePasswordAuthentication\": false, \"patchSettings\": {\"patchMode\": \"AutomaticByPlatform\"}}'), json('null'))]"
        windowsConfiguration: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), json('{\"enableAutomaticUpdates\": true, \"patchSettings\": {\"patchMode\": \"AutomaticByPlatform\"}, \"provisionVMAgent\": true}'), json('null'))]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference: "[variables('imageReference')]"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-osdisk')]"
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
          diskSizeGB: 128
          deleteOption: Delete
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-nic'))]"
            properties:
              deleteOption: Delete
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
    tags:
      environment: development
      purpose: developer-workstation
      vmIndex: "[string(copyIndex(1))]"
    copy:
      name: vmCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '/installDevTools')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    condition: "[equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1)))]"
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.Compute
      type: CustomScriptExtension
      typeHandlerVersion: "1.10"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      settings:
        commandToExecute: >-
          powershell -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Command "
          Set-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Scope Process -Force;
          [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol -bor 3072;
          Invoke-Expression ((New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://community.chocolatey.org/install.ps1'));
          choco install git vscode dotnet-sdk googlechrome -y --no-progress;
          Write-Host 'Dev tools installation completed.'
          "
    copy:
      name: windowsExtCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '/installDevTools')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    condition: "[equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1)))]"
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.Azure.Extensions
      type: CustomScript
      typeHandlerVersion: "2.1"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      settings:
        commandToExecute: >-
          bash -c "
          apt-get update &&
          apt-get install -y git curl wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common build-essential &&
          curl -fsSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/microsoft.gpg &&
          echo 'Dev tools installation completed.'
          "
    copy:
      name: linuxExtCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '/autoShutdown')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1)))]"
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.DevTestLab
      type: WindowsShutdown
      typeHandlerVersion: "1.0"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
    condition: false
    copy:
      name: shutdownExtCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.DevTestLab/schedules
    apiVersion: "2018-09-15"
    name: "[concat('shutdown-computevm-', parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1)))]"
    properties:
      status: Enabled
      taskType: ComputeVmShutdownTask
      dailyRecurrence:
        time: "1900"
      timeZoneId: UTC
      notificationSettings:
        status: Enabled
        timeInMinutes: 30
        notificationLocale: en
      targetResourceId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1)))]"
    copy:
      name: shutdownScheduleCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

outputs:
  vmConnectionInfo:
    type: array
    copy:
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      input:
        vmName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1))]"
        publicIPAddress: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).ipAddress]"
        fqdn: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).dnsSettings.fqdn]"
        connectionCommand: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), concat('mstsc /v:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).ipAddress), concat('ssh ', parameters('adminUsername'), '@', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).ipAddress))]"

  nsgName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('nsgName')]"

  vnetName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('vnetName')]"

  securityReminder:
    type: string
    value: "[if(equals(parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix'), '*'), 'WARNING: NSG is open to all source IPs. Restrict allowedSourceIPPrefix to your office/home IP range for better security.', concat('Access restricted to source IP prefix: ', parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix')))]"

  autoShutdownInfo:
    type: string
    value: VMs are configured to auto-shutdown at 7:00 PM UTC daily to save costs. Modify the schedule in the Azure portal if needed.
